author: lOrm
content: Landed native GlobTool at src/tools/file/glob.rs (#567). Pattern dialect mirrors src/permissions.rs::glob_to_regex (* / ** / ? with regex-special escaping). Walker caps at 100 matches (MAX_RESULTS) + 50k visited entries (MAX_WALK_ENTRIES); skips vendor dirs (.git, node_modules, target, dist, build) unless caller explicitly names them. Registered as 'glob' handler in src/tools/registry.rs, added to KNOWN_SAFE in #782 enumeration, and to required-tools list in test_tool_definitions. 4 tests in src/tools/file/glob.rs: single-star scoping, double-star descent, missing-arg error, special-char escape robustness.
